name: send_magic_link
description: Send a magic link to a user's email address for passwordless authentication. The user clicks the link to log in. If the email doesn't match an existing user, a new user is created automatically.

parameters.name: email
parameters.description: The email address to send the magic link to.

parameters.name: login_magic_link_url
parameters.description: The URL the user is redirected to after clicking the magic link for login.

parameters.name: signup_magic_link_url
parameters.description: The URL the user is redirected to after clicking the magic link for signup.

parameters.name: login_expiration_minutes
parameters.description: Expiration time for login magic links in minutes (5-10080). Defaults to 60.

parameters.name: signup_expiration_minutes
parameters.description: Expiration time for signup magic links in minutes (5-10080). Defaults to 10080.

parameters.name: locale
parameters.description: Language for the email. Supported: en, es, fr, pt-br.
